description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsLeatherette upperTwo main compartments with one zipped pocket in one Two short handles woven through metallic loops Stitch detailing with an inverted pleat design on the front and a pleated design at the back for styleMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 29 cmWidth: 45 cmDepth: 14 cm
